name: Feretha, the Hollow Founder
visual_description: A desiccated corpse-king seated on a technological throne, skeletal frame draped in decayed royal robes. A golden crown fused with neural interface cables crowns his hollow skull. Fluid tubes and glowing conduits snake from his empty eye sockets into a humming server rack, his body a puppet of ancient machinery.
full_prompt: A desiccated corpse-king seated on a technological throne, skeletal frame draped in decayed royal robes. A golden crown fused with neural interface cables crowns his hollow skull. Fluid tubes and glowing conduits snake from his empty eye sockets into a humming server rack, his body a puppet of ancient machinery.. Stylized digital illustration, structured balanced composition, warm sandstone and ivory tones, golden-hour lighting with long shadows, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
